잠언 21:1.content: The king’s heart is in Yahweh’s hand like the watercourses. He turns it wherever he desires.

잠언 21:2.content: Every way of a man is right in his own eyes, but Yahweh weighs the hearts.

잠언 21:3.content: To do righteousness and justice is more acceptable to Yahweh than sacrifice.

잠언 21:4.content: A high look and a proud heart, the lamp of the wicked, is sin.

잠언 21:5.content: The plans of the diligent surely lead to profit; and everyone who is hasty surely rushes to poverty.

잠언 21:6.content: Getting treasures by a lying tongue is a fleeting vapor for those who seek death.

잠언 21:7.content: The violence of the wicked will drive them away, because they refuse to do what is right.

잠언 21:8.content: The way of the guilty is devious, but the conduct of the innocent is upright.

잠언 21:9.content: It is better to dwell in the corner of the housetop than to share a house with a contentious woman.

잠언 21:10.content: The soul of the wicked desires evil; his neighbor finds no mercy in his eyes.

잠언 21:11.content: When the mocker is punished, the simple gains wisdom. When the wise is instructed, he receives knowledge.

잠언 21:12.content: The Righteous One considers the house of the wicked, and brings the wicked to ruin.

잠언 21:13.content: Whoever stops his ears at the cry of the poor, he will also cry out, but shall not be heard.

잠언 21:14.content: A gift in secret pacifies anger, and a bribe in the cloak, strong wrath.

잠언 21:15.content: It is joy to the righteous to do justice; but it is a destruction to the workers of iniquity.

잠언 21:16.content: The man who wanders out of the way of understanding shall rest in the assembly of the departed spirits.

잠언 21:17.content: He who loves pleasure will be a poor man. He who loves wine and oil won’t be rich.

잠언 21:18.content: The wicked is a ransom for the righteous, the treacherous for the upright.

잠언 21:19.content: It is better to dwell in a desert land, than with a contentious and fretful woman.

잠언 21:20.content: There is precious treasure and oil in the dwelling of the wise; but a foolish man swallows it up.

잠언 21:21.content: He who follows after righteousness and kindness finds life, righteousness, and honor.

잠언 21:22.content: A wise man scales the city of the mighty, and brings down the strength of its confidence.

잠언 21:23.content: Whoever guards his mouth and his tongue keeps his soul from troubles.

잠언 21:24.content: The proud and arrogant man—“Scoffer” is his name— he works in the arrogance of pride.

잠언 21:25.content: The desire of the sluggard kills him, for his hands refuse to labor.

잠언 21:26.content: There are those who covet greedily all day long; but the righteous give and don’t withhold.

잠언 21:27.content: The sacrifice of the wicked is an abomination— how much more, when he brings it with a wicked mind!

잠언 21:28.content: A false witness will perish. A man who listens speaks to eternity.

잠언 21:29.content: A wicked man hardens his face; but as for the upright, he establishes his ways.

잠언 21:30.content: There is no wisdom nor understanding nor counsel against Yahweh.

잠언 21:31.content: The horse is prepared for the day of battle; but victory is with Yahweh.
